34.reason: // The second polynomial input loop may not execute because the first loop already consumed all input until EOF; after the first loop breaks on '\n', the second scanf starts reading but might hit EOF immediately if input ends, causing the loop to never run.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  // The second polynomial input loop may not execute because the first loop already consumed all input until EOF; after the first loop breaks on '\n', the second scanf starts reading but might hit EOF immediately if input ends, causing the loop to never run.

65.reason: // Array index out of bounds: when j == count-1, zhi[j+1] accesses zhi[count], which is beyond the allocated size (0..299). This leads to undefined behavior.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  // Array index out of bounds: when j == count-1, zhi[j+1] accesses zhi[count], which is beyond the allocated size (0..299). This leads to undefined behavior.

78.reason: // Array index out of bounds: when i == count-1, zhi[i+1] and xi[i+1] access elements beyond the array boundary, leading to undefined behavior.
